title: Garlicky German Fried Rice
description: A simple and flavorful German-inspired fried rice dish infused with garlicky and delicate flavors.

ingredients.name: delicate herbs (such as parsley or dill)

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the cooked jasmine rice and stir-fry for about 5 minutes, breaking up any clumps.
Add the fried rice and stir-fry for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with delicate herbs and serve hot.
